indicators.name: hard industrial surfaces
indicators.rationale: The hard industrial surfaces of the tables, chairs, and bar counter are incompatible with a sleep environment.

indicators.name: open commercial layout
indicators.rationale: The open, throughfare-prone commercial layout provides no privacy or acoustic enclosure for sleep.

indicators.name: bright overhead lighting
indicators.rationale: Bright overhead lighting is incompatible with sleep, as it cannot be dimmed and disrupts circadian signaling.

indicators.name: no horizontal rest surface
indicators.rationale: There is no horizontal rest surface available in the scene, making it unsuitable for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This is a commercial setting with hard industrial surfaces, an open layout, bright lighting, and no horizontal rest surface, making it completely unsuitable for primary sleep.
